batches.name: Delivery Foundation
batches.validation_criteria: Validate contract tests in CI, invalid fixture failure behavior, render checks for stubs, CI rejection of seeded invalid YAML or secrets, and runbook link validation.

batches.name: Compatibility and Modes
batches.validation_criteria: Validate matrix grade mapping tests, profile fixture schema checks, and deterministic mode output tests.

batches.name: Preflight and Discovery Engine
batches.validation_criteria: Validate preflight test coverage for all check classes, full expected file generation from sample run, and smoke bundle pass on reference cluster profile.

batches.name: Collector Core Topology
batches.validation_criteria: Validate helm template plus cluster dry-run apply, required collector chains and export checks, and bounded-loss simulation metrics.

batches.name: Logs Pipeline
batches.validation_criteria: Validate single-line and multiline fixture tests, sensitive fixture redaction or drop behavior, and clean template and policy install with dashboard render checks.

batches.name: Metrics and Traces Pipelines
batches.validation_criteria: Validate opted-in workload metrics indexing, trace ingest with sampling targets matching policy, and synthetic plus pilot correlation tests.

batches.name: Onboarding and Subscription Model
batches.validation_criteria: Validate one-block onboarding chart rendering, non-compliant onboarding rejection with clear output, and one-block onboarding CI smoke pass.

batches.name: Security, Isolation, and Resilience
batches.validation_criteria: Validate expected cross-team access denials, CI security contract and audit tests, and successful non-production restore plus rollback drills.

batches.name: Operator Experience and SLO Operations
batches.validation_criteria: Validate saved object import on test cluster, synthetic event alert routing, and drill evidence plus alert-noise trend checks.

batches.name: Visualization and Admin Access Plane
batches.validation_criteria: Validate signal-to-UI ownership contract linting, core UI provisioning path rendering, admin-access profile schema checks, and admin GUI TLS plus login smoke results.

batches.name: Vector Foundations
batches.validation_criteria: Validate versioned extraction snapshot bundle output, OpenSearch vector write and queryability, and quality baseline plus governance checks.

batches.name: Graph Foundation
batches.validation_criteria: Validate healthy core platform behavior with graph on and off, convergent repeated sync runs, and stale-data freshness alert triggering.

batches.name: Risk Scoring and Assisted RCA Readiness
batches.validation_criteria: Validate deterministic score reruns, backtest and evidence bundle contracts, and approval evidence before RCA suggestion release.

batches.name: Core Adapter Integrations
batches.validation_criteria: Validate adapter contract schema coverage, profile-driven activation safety, identity and secrets and network stub metadata, CI contract gating, CI/CD neutrality checks, and adapter operations guide completeness.

batches.name: AI/MCP Runtime Validation and Productization
batches.validation_criteria: Validate AI agent boundary, governance, and state contracts; MCP catalog and tool response contracts; AI runtime base, MCP read-path, multi-agent, KHook trigger, and action-gate scaffolding; and KAgent/KHook release readiness.

batches.name: SaaS Multi-Tenancy and Customer Isolation
batches.validation_criteria: Validate tenant schema with seeded invalid rejection, per-tenant isolation matrix coverage, cross-tenant denial fixtures, lifecycle transitions with purge evidence, and per-tenant overlay generation safety.

batches.name: Unified Configuration and Management Plane
batches.validation_criteria: Validate wrapped-system registry coverage with fork rejection, unified configuration binding completeness, GitOps-only propagation with drift detection, and single-pane UI catalog auth mapping.

batches.name: Discovery and Preflight Execution Engine (Runtime)
batches.validation_criteria: Validate read-only executor RBAC, preflight and discovery report schema conformance, deterministic grading and mode and remediation outputs, offline fixture-driven validator pass, and executor operator runbook completeness.

batches.name: Guided Installation Experience
batches.validation_criteria: Validate install flow contract step order, wizard answer validation with seeded invalid-answers rejection, GitOps-only render output, post-install readiness invocation with install summary, and installation guide completeness.

batches.name: Configuration Rendering Runtime
batches.validation_criteria: Validate renderer ADR and architecture contract, byte-identical re-render tests, generated-file header and commit trailer checks, rendered-versus-live drift diff output, rollback re-render drill in dry-run mode, and offline fixture harness pass.

batches.name: Tenant Control Plane Service
batches.validation_criteria: Validate OpenAPI contract lifecycle semantics, idempotent replay tests per transition, isolation provisioning render fixtures, approval denial and timeout tests with tenant-scoped audit records, and seeded denial fixture rejection offline.

batches.name: Unified Management Portal
batches.validation_criteria: Validate portal contract schema checks, UI catalog aggregation tests, Git-commit-only config edit flow tests, SSO role mapping and tenant scoping tests, and admin GUI smoke extension for the portal endpoint.

batches.name: Metering, Billing, and Commercial Operations
batches.validation_criteria: Validate metering contract dimension coverage, control-tenancy index write tests with tenant attribution, plan catalog quota bound checks, billing adapter stub metadata and rollback notes, and seeded rejection fixture behavior.

batches.name: Live-Cluster Validation and Evidence
batches.validation_criteria: Validate harness contract and ADR coherence with pinned entry point, captured install and readiness evidence chain, live drill and GUI smoke and SDN-B15 denial evidence artifacts, captured-evidence references in validation contracts, and disabled-by-default nightly workflow posture.

batches.name: AI/MCP Runtime Activation
batches.validation_criteria: Validate model-provider adapter stub metadata and secrets-backend key resolution, live KAgent and KHook and MCP gateway deployment evidence, trigger-to-casefile-to-approval rehearsal evidence with policy and redaction and audit intact, signoff record with measured thresholds, structural activation checks without a cluster, and extended AI runbook sections.

batches.name: Production Operations and Release Engineering
batches.validation_criteria: Validate release contract semver and changelog and OCI publication rules, concrete registry pins with fail-if rule pass and harness install evidence, N-1 upgrade evidence with data and config survival, platform SLO extension checks, SBOM and image scan and license inventory artifacts, production reference architecture section checks, and seeded unpinned-profile and missing-license rejections.

batches.name: Product Documentation and GA Readiness
batches.validation_criteria: Validate product docs index and audience map coverage, core and tenant and commercial document presence checks, generated API reference marker and contract fidelity, docs-coverage matrix with every Batch 17-25 capability mapped, link validation across the docs tree, and signed GA readiness checklist with per-item evidence links.
